releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description:
- Revert update from 0.9.6

❗ Notice: The latest update (0.9.6) affects the hover-editor plugin and may cause some unexpected issues [issue 232](https://github.com/PKM-er/Obsidian-Surfing/issues/232). I have reverted the update. Please upgrade to version 0.9.8 if you have already installed 0.9.6. We apologize for any inconvenience caused. 😔

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/PKM-er/Obsidian-Surfing/compare/0.9.7...0.9.8

* feat: use obsidian menu to create menu instead by @Quorafind in https://github.com/PKM-er/Obsidian-Surfing/pull/221

* [feat: support random image](https://github.com/PKM-er/Obsidian-Surfing/pull/221/commits/430336dc1eafd688228e9167841760a77fb141b8)
* [feat: support last opened files](https://github.com/PKM-er/Obsidian-Surfing/pull/221/commits/7a4b24e6268a0372526baf8ac4053353fed80ef4)
* [fix: don't show context menu on linkel anymore](https://github.com/PKM-er/Obsidian-Surfing/pull/221/commits/700faf817f224f0f53c7ccf202058d94cc11f7b0)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/PKM-er/Obsidian-Surfing/compare/0.9.2...0.9.3

releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* fix grammar mistake in README by @sharkmu in https://github.com/PKM-er/Obsidian-Surfing/pull/215
* Feat/open file by @Quorafind in https://github.com/PKM-er/Obsidian-Surfing/pull/220
- In page search bar, you can use `/` to call file suggester;
- For header search bar, don't need `/`, but only works when you are not using bookmark.

## New Contributors
* @sharkmu made their first contribution in https://github.com/PKM-er/Obsidian-Surfing/pull/215

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/PKM-er/Obsidian-Surfing/compare/0.9.1...0.9.2
